headline: LA County Erases $433M in Medical Debt for Over 200K Residents
meta_description: Since 2024, LA County has cancelled over $433 million in medical debt for more than 200,500 residents through an innovative debt relief program.
summary_short: LA County's new medical debt cancellation program has erased $433M in debt for over 200,500 residents since launching in 2024, with families notified by letter.
body:
Los Angeles County has cancelled over $433 million in medical debt for more than 200,500 residents since the program launched in 2024. Qualifying households received letters notifying them that their medical debt had been erased—a straightforward approach that turns financial relief into tangible relief.

The scale of this effort reveals the burden medical debt places on everyday families. By identifying and automatically cancelling qualifying debts rather than requiring residents to apply, the county removed a significant barrier that often prevents people from accessing relief programs they're entitled to receive.

This initiative demonstrates how targeted debt cancellation can reshape financial stability for hundreds of thousands of people, freeing families from the weight of unexpected medical expenses and offering a pathway toward economic breathing room.
quick_facts: $433 million in medical debt cancelled since 2024
Over 200,500 LA County residents received debt relief
Qualifying households notified by letter of cancellation
